pageContext.name: Minaton's Heart
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Star Ace Toys are excited to present the Minaton's Heart 1:1 Scaled Replica!  The servant of an evil sorceress, the Minaton is a great bronze automaton that exists only to serve the will of its master. Powered by a clockwork heart, this large metal Minotaur has the strength of many men and towers over normal humans.   Created by stop-motion genius Ray Harryhausen, this detailed replica of the animation puppet's heart comes with electrical and mechanical parts.  Don't miss your chance to add this replica to your collection today!
